title: Untiled Entities
description: Ever wanted tile entities as a decoration without the worry of that gui not allowing pistons or framed blocks to work? Then this mod is for you. Essentially adds non functional tile entities.
body:
This mod plans to get as many tile entities as possible and convert them into regular blocks which can allow them to be pushed by pistons, be used on [Framed blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks) and just be good decoration without needed to care about the gui or function of the block. All rotations and block breaking behaviors will remain the same, only difference is now the blocks will be just blocks.

List of current blocks:

Barrel

TNT

**This mod is only available on modrinth and curseforge**

Report any bugs at https://discord.gg/r4tYFTsskq

This mod is entended to be an addon to [Framed blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks) but it can be used separately. There are plans to get tile entities from other mods so you can use them with framed blocks or just for decorative purposes.

List Of Future Blocks:

Crafting Table

Furnace

Blocks from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
